title: SetSpawn
description: A Simple Setspawn Plugin For Your Servers. Made By Worty1
body:
# Simple SetSpawn Plugin

Easily set and manage spawn points on your Minecraft server with this simple and lightweight plugin. Designed with server admins in mind, it allows you to take full control over where players appear in your world without dealing with complicated commands or configurations.

## Features:
- Quickly set and update spawn locations for your players
- Lightweight and easy to install, ensuring minimal impact on server performance
- Compatible with most Minecraft server versions, making it flexible for any setup
- Intuitive commands that save you time and effort

## Why Choose This Plugin?

Whether you’re running a small private server or a large public one, this spawn plugin makes managing player spawns straightforward and hassle-free. Enhance your server experience and give your players a smooth, controlled spawning process with just a few simple commands!
